allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "echo connected && uname -a && which autossh")
Bash(sshpass -p 'n\(}Z#tES7\)GW3Td' ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "echo connected && uname -a")

Bash(sshpass -p 'n\(}Z#tES7\)GW3Td' ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "echo ''=== 当前SSH配置 ==='' && grep -E ''^\(GatewayPorts|PasswordAuthentication|PubkeyAuthentication\)'' /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo ''配置项未找到''; echo ''=== 检查2222端口 ==='' && ss -tlnp | grep 2222 || echo ''2222端口未开放''")

Bash(sshpass -p 'n\(}Z#tES7\)GW3Td' ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "sudo sed -i ''s/^#GatewayPorts.*/GatewayPorts yes/'' /etc/ssh/sshd_config; sudo sed -i ''/^GatewayPorts/a GatewayPorts yes'' /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null; sudo grep GatewayPorts /etc/ssh/sshd_config || echo ''GatewayPorts yes'' | sudo tee -a /etc/ssh/sshd_config")
Bash(sshpass -p 'n\(}Z#tES7\)GW3Td' ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "sudo systemctl restart sshd && sudo ss -tlnp | grep 22")

Bash(sshpass -p 'n\(}Z#tES7\)GW3Td' ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 ubuntu@62.234.163.57 "sudo ufw allow 2222/tcp 2>/dev/null || sudo firewall-cmd --add-port=2222/tcp 2>/dev/null || echo ''防火墙规则添加失败或无需添加''")
